MARTIN COUNTY, FLORIDA: @ICEgov is asking local authorities to NOT RELEASE an illegal alien monster who repeatedly sexually abused a 12-YEAR-OLD. 

Henry Roldan Perez-Roblero, a Guatemalan national, was arrested after being caught having sex with the 12-year-old girl. The abuse is believed to have lasted 2 YEARS. 

Working alongside our partners in Florida, ICE is ensuring this creep is NEVER released back into our communities to victimize another innocent child.
